user.title: Tado CE Setup
user.description: Click Submit to start the authorization process.

authorize.title: Authorize Tado
authorize.description:
**Step 1:** Click the link below to open Tado login:

**[Click here to authorize]({url})**

Or go to `https://login.tado.com/device` and enter code: **{code}**

**Step 2:** Log in to your Tado account and authorize the connection.

**Step 3:** After you see "Successfully connected" on Tado's website, click Submit below.

select_home.title: Select Home
select_home.description: Multiple Tado homes found. Please select which home to use.

reconfigure.title: Re-authenticate Tado CE
reconfigure.description: Click Submit to start re-authentication. This will refresh your Tado credentials without removing the integration.

reconfigure_authorize.title: Authorize Tado
reconfigure_authorize.description:
**Step 1:** Click the link below to open Tado login:

**[Click here to authorize]({url})**

Or go to `https://login.tado.com/device` and enter code: **{code}**

**Step 2:** Log in to your Tado account and authorize the connection.

**Step 3:** After you see "Successfully connected" on Tado's website, click Submit below.

reconfigure_select_home.title: Select Home
reconfigure_select_home.description: Your previous home is no longer available. Please select a new home.

progress.poll: Waiting for authorization... Please complete login in your browser.

abort.no_homes: No Tado homes found for this account.
abort.reconfigure_successful: Re-authentication successful! Your new credentials have been saved.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Tado. Please check your internet connection.
error.auth_pending: Authorization not yet complete. Please authorize on Tado's website first, then click Submit again.
error.authorization_failed: Authorization failed. Please try again from the beginning.

init.title: Tado CE Options
init.description:
Configure Tado CE integration settings.

⚠️ **Known Issue:** If options don't save after clicking Submit, please select an entity in 'Outdoor Temperature Entity' field (e.g., weather.home). This is a [Home Assistant Core limitation](https://github.com/home-assistant/core/issues/154795). See [Discussion #76](https://github.com/hiall-fyi/tado_ce/discussions/76) for details.

tado_ce_exclusive.name: Tado CE Exclusive
tado_ce_exclusive.description: Features unique to Tado CE integration

data_description.smart_comfort_enabled: Preheat advisor, mold risk, comfort level sensors
data_description.thermal_analytics_enabled: Thermal inertia, heating rate, efficiency sensors
data_description.thermal_analytics_zones: Select zones for thermal analytics (deselect passive heating zones)
data_description.adaptive_preheat_enabled: Auto-start heating at recommended preheat time (requires Smart Comfort)
data_description.schedule_calendar_enabled: Display heating schedules as calendar entities (read-only)
data_description.zone_configuration_enabled: Per-zone settings: heat emitter type, overlay mode, temp limits
data_description.test_mode_enabled: Simulate 100 API call limit for testing quota protection

tado_data.name: Tado Data
tado_data.description: Extra data from Tado API (additional API calls)

data_description.weather_enabled: Outside temperature and solar intensity (+1 API call per sync)
data_description.home_state_sync_enabled: Sync home/away state for Away Mode switch (+1 API call per sync)
data_description.mobile_devices_enabled: Track mobile devices for geofencing (+1 API call per full sync)
data_description.mobile_devices_frequent_sync: Sync mobile devices on every poll instead of only full sync
data_description.offset_enabled: Add offset_celsius attribute to climate entities (+1 API call per device)

data_description.outdoor_temp_entity: Temperature sensor for weather compensation (e.g., weather.home)
data_description.hot_water_timer_duration: Default duration when turning on hot water (5-1440 min)
data_description.smart_comfort_mode: Adjusts target temp based on outdoor conditions
data_description.use_feels_like: Use feels-like (apparent) temperature instead of actual
data_description.mold_risk_window_type: Window type for mold risk surface temperature calculation
data_description.smart_comfort_history_days: Days of temperature history for rate calculation (1-30)
data_description.heating_cycle_history_days: Days of heating cycle history to keep (1-30)
data_description.heating_cycle_min_cycles: Minimum completed cycles before showing analytics (1-10)
data_description.heating_cycle_inertia_threshold: Temperature change threshold to detect inertia end (0.05-0.5°C)

data_description.day_start_hour: Hour when day period starts (0-23, default: 7)
data_description.night_start_hour: Hour when night period starts (0-23, default: 23)
data_description.custom_day_interval: Override smart polling for daytime (1-1440 min, empty for auto)
data_description.custom_night_interval: Override smart polling for nighttime (1-1440 min, empty for auto)
data_description.refresh_debounce_seconds: Delay before refreshing after state changes (1-60s)
data_description.api_history_retention_days: Days to keep API call history (0 = forever)
data_description.quota_reserve_enabled: Pause polling when quota is low. Disable only if you understand the risks.

error.interval_out_of_range: Polling interval must be between 1 and 1440 minutes
